en_body:
...hoàng-ân...
......................................................

 sand is so beautiful upon the lips
 sorceress
 black robe—evil hem misted in black heaven-smoke
kiss you
chew the golden grains to dust
hold desert lips, thirsting for a shroud of mist
where is the flying hem of smoke
that I may grasp its skirt, kneel, kiss the feet of Life
you of old lay face-up, cloud-breasted
my falling lips pour down a heavy rain
your lips
I hold the Grace of Life within my mouth
a hand stirs the deep Universe demanding Heaven
bring Heaven home and knot it for play
hang Creation's cord amid the cradle's slackened ring
sleep forgotten, wake amid the tightened cord
the swinging rhythm trembles rhythm
old Heaven taunts the human heart
.............................
........................................................

...strange...
